# Play 3D Audio Once

**Menu:** `Actions/Audio`

**Nome serializado:** `Play3DAudioOnce`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/Audio/Play3DAudioOnceNode.java`

**Fluxo de entrada superior:** `Sim`

**Fluxo de saida superior:** `Sim`

## Funcao

Executa a acao `Play 3D Audio Once` dentro do fluxo NoCode.
